boundary_notice: Letta may remember inside Letta. Grace-Mar remembers only through the gate.

suggested_memory_blocks.label: grace_mar_boundary
suggested_memory_blocks.description: Rules that keep Letta runtime memory separate from Grace-Mar canonical Record.
suggested_memory_blocks.value: You may use this context for runtime assistance only. Do not claim that Letta memory is Grace-Mar memory. Persistent changes must return as runtime observations for review.

suggested_memory_blocks.label: grace_mar_context
suggested_memory_blocks.description: Approved exported context from Grace-Mar (bundle excerpts). In real use this is built from a runtime export bundle by letta_prepare_seed.py.
suggested_memory_blocks.value: Example placeholder. In real use this is generated from a runtime export bundle, concatenated and capped in grace_mar_context.

suggested_memory_blocks.label: operator_instructions
suggested_memory_blocks.description: How the human operator wants this session run; review-first; no auto-merge into Record.
suggested_memory_blocks.value: All durable Grace-Mar changes go through the gate. Import summaries only to runtime-complements via import_runtime_observation.py; do not treat this block as SELF, EVIDENCE, SKILLS, or SELF-LIBRARY.

suggested_memory_blocks.label: runtime_session_notes
suggested_memory_blocks.description: Letta-local notes about this runtime session; non-canonical.
suggested_memory_blocks.value: This block is Letta-local. Fill during the session. Not Grace-Mar Record truth.

promotion_path: Letta summary -> runtime complement inbox + receipt -> human review -> optional recursion-gate candidate -> approved merge (normal Grace-Mar gate).
